introSection: Montaña Suiza is a steel roller coaster located at Parque de Atracciones Monte Igueldo in San Sebastián, Guipuzcoa, Basque Country, Spain. Montaña Suiza is Spanish for Swiss Mountain. It is the oldest steel roller coaster in operation.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 2 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 5 rows for a total of 20 riders per train.

fullText:
Montaña Suiza is a steel roller coaster located at Parque de Atracciones Monte Igueldo in San Sebastián, Guipuzcoa, Basque Country, Spain. Montaña Suiza is Spanish for Swiss Mountain. It is the oldest steel roller coaster in operation.



2 trains with 2 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 5 rows for a total of 20 riders per train.
